Hero.headline:
Luxury stay
experience at
Hero.subheadline: Discover comfort, elegance, and unforgettable moments in the heart of Agadir.

Location.subtitle: Location
Location.title:
The heart of Agadir,
at your doorstep.
Location.desc: Perfectly situated steps from the beach with breathtaking views of the Atlantic Ocean and the Agadir Kasbah.

Concept.subtitle: About LIHOAS
Concept.title: Where comfort meets Agadir's natural beauty.
Concept.p1: LIHOAS is a premium luxury hotel nestled in the heart of Agadir. Our architecture seamlessly integrates modern design with the timeless warmth of Moroccan hospitality.
Concept.p2: Every detail — from our sun-drenched pools to our ocean-view suites — has been crafted to deliver an unforgettable experience for every guest.

Amenities.subtitle: Hotel Amenities
Amenities.title: Everything you need for a perfect stay.
Amenities.a1_desc: Wake up to panoramic views of the Atlantic from your private balcony.
Amenities.a2_desc: Three heated pools surrounded by lush palms and ocean breezes.
Amenities.a3_desc: Savor Moroccan and international cuisine at our rooftop restaurant.
Amenities.a4_desc: Full Hammam, massage rooms, and wellness therapies to restore your body.

CTA.title:
Your perfect escape
awaits at LIHOAS.
CTA.desc: Reserve your stay today and experience the best of Agadir — from our luxurious rooms to the pristine Atlantic beach.

About.intro_desc: Presenting LIHOAS as a premium hotel in Agadir offering world-class comfort, modern architectural design, and exceptional personalized service. Experience a luxury stay like never before.
About.e1_desc: Designed with modern aesthetics and premium comfort in mind.
About.e2_desc: A tranquil oasis to unwind and recharge amidst the city.
About.e3_desc: Our dedicated staff ensuring your every need is met seamlessly.
About.e4_desc: Situated perfectly in Agadir for exploring the best of the city.

LocalAttractions.subtitle: Explore Agadir
LocalAttractions.title: Discover the City Beyond Our Doors
LocalAttractions.desc: From ancient hilltop ruins to golden beaches and vibrant souks — Agadir is full of unforgettable experiences waiting for you.
LocalAttractions.p1_desc: One of Morocco's most iconic beaches — 10km of golden sand, warm Atlantic waters and beach clubs.
LocalAttractions.p2_desc: A hilltop fortress ruins from 1540 offering stunning panoramic views over the city and ocean.
LocalAttractions.p3_desc: The largest market in Morocco. A sensory journey through spices, crafts, and fresh local produce.
LocalAttractions.p4_desc: A charming urban park home to exotic birds and lush gardens — a tranquil escape in the heart of the city.
LocalAttractions.p5_desc: A unique Moroccan garden attraction with over 300 crocodiles and exotic tropical plants.
LocalAttractions.p6_desc: A stylish waterfront promenade with restaurants, boutiques, and stunning views of the harbour.

Stays.subtitle: Accommodations
Stays.title: Discover Your Retreat
Stays.desc: Choose from our selection of meticulously designed rooms, each offering breathtaking views and everything you need for an unforgettable stay in Agadir.
Stays.r1_desc: The pinnacle of luxury. Features a private terrace, king-sized bed, and panoramic views of the Atlantic Ocean and the Agadir Kasbah.
Stays.r2_desc: Spacious and bright, equipped with premium amenities and a stunning ocean-facing balcony overlooking the Agadir coastline.
Stays.r3_desc: A comfortable and elegantly designed retreat — the ideal base for discovering the best that Agadir has to offer.

Booking.title: Book Your Stay
Booking.subtitle: Reserve your luxury experience at LIHOAS Agadir.
Booking.success_desc: Thank you, {name}. We look forward to welcoming you to LIHOAS.
